---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for a new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution

Clearly describe what you'd like to see implemented.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Are there other ways this could be solved?

## Who would benefit?

Explain how this feature would help users or the platform.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
